headline: Eaton Corporation plc (ETN): Industrial Firm Growing Dominant in Liquid Cooling
summary: We just covered the 12 Best AI Data Center Stocks to Buy Right Now and Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) ranks 6th on this list.
